tests.name: CREATE
tests.detail: Record found in Turbopuffer via BM25 search 11s after CDC event written to S3

tests.name: UPDATE
tests.detail: City field updated to UpdatedCity_1773655956, reflected in Turbopuffer within 12s

tests.name: DELETE
tests.detail: Record removed from Turbopuffer search results within 11s of CDC DELETE event

validated: S3 → EventBridge → CDC sync Lambda → Turbopuffer upsert/delete (downstream sync path)
DELETE propagation (record removed from search index)
Latency: all CRUD ops complete in <15s (well within 5-min SLA)
not_validated: Salesforce CDC → AppFlow → S3 delivery (script writes synthetic CDC payloads directly to S3; AppFlow CDC flows require Connected App with Client Credentials grant)
LWC/query UI observability (script queries Turbopuffer directly via backend.search(), not through /query Lambda or LWC frontend)
